feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack BHS0817B02A maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 05:00 - 05:30 UTC

Jul 15, 07:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack BHS0817B02A.

Start time : 06/08/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 05:30 UTC
Service impact : If LACP is enabled, temporary bandwidth perturbations may be observed on both the public and private networks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SGP1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 040620B maintenance notification

End time : 27/07/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : vRack network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in the rack 040620B.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA4][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0404A01B Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 13, 11:51 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack GRA0404A01B.

Start time : 23/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 9, 19:12 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack GRA0326B03C.

Start time : 23/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case. Additionally, public and vRacks networks might be temporarily unavailable for the servers during the maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R809R11 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 09:52 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 16/07/2026 08:42 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 09:50 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 16, 09:03 UTC
Update - Please find an update of this incident below :

Update: Some servers in the rack R809R11 are progressively becoming operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore full service as quickly as possible and are closely monitoring system stability.

We will keep you updated on the progress and final resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 16, 08:59 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the rack R809R11.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 16/07/2026 08:42 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack R809R11 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G233B07 Migration Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 09:15 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Update - The current maintenance will take more time than expected.

Jul 16, 04:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 2, 14:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration from rack G233B07 to G233B08.

Start time : 16/07/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack G233B07 will be unavailable during maintenance for 2 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0313A02C Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 01:32 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 15/07/2026 22:45 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 01:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 16, 01:10 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack GRA0313A02C.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 15/07/2026 22:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack GRA0313A02C are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 15, 22:58 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack GRA0313A02C.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 15/07/2026 22:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack GRA0313A02C are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
